title: Cherry-pick PR #778: Update chessground to 10.1.1 (black line artifacts fix)

source.notes: Merged 2026-03-29T20:13:31Z. Fixes visual black line artifacts on chess tile boundaries.

description: Bump @lichess-org/chessground from 10.0.2 to 10.1.1. This resolves black line rendering artifacts that appear between chess tiles on certain displays/zoom levels. The change is a dependency version bump only — no source code changes beyond package.json and pnpm-lock.yaml.
notes: IMPORTANT: We have a custom CSS override at src/styles/chessgroundBaseOverride.css
This override fixes coordinate positioning (Francisco's CSS was backwards)
Must verify coordinate display still works correctly after the bump
chessground 10.1.1 may have changed its own CSS — check for conflicts
The bump is ^10.1.1 so pnpm install will pull the latest 10.x

in_scope: Run pnpm install to update lockfile
Verify board renders correctly with no black line artifacts
Verify coordinate overlay still works with our CSS override
out_of_scope: Rewriting chessgroundBaseOverride.css (unless the bump breaks it)

requirements: Board renders with no black line artifacts between tiles
Coordinate display works in all modes (edge, all squares, none)
edge_cases: Board at different zoom levels (Ctrl+/-, browser zoom)
Board as black (flipped orientation) — coordinates must be correct

requirements: No visible stutter or flicker during piece movement

acceptance_gates: pnpm tauri dev launches without errors
Board renders cleanly — no black lines between tiles
Coordinates display correctly (edge mode, both orientations)

manual: Open app, verify board has no black line artifacts between tiles
Zoom in/out (Ctrl+/Ctrl-) and check for artifacts at different zoom levels
Flip board and verify coordinates are still correct
Play a few moves (drag and click) to verify interaction works
Check arrow drawing still works (right-click drag on board)
Verify premove highlighting (play vs engine, premove a response)

done_criteria: No black line artifacts on board
